qa_pairs.question: How can a user retrieve the AnsysEDT 2024R2.1 Antennas examples to their account?
qa_pairs.answer: To retrieve the AnsysEDT 2024R2.1 Antennas examples, first load the `ansysedt/2024R2.1` module. Then, create the necessary directory structure and copy the examples by executing the commands `mkdir -p ~/Ansoft/$EBVERSIONANSYSEDT; rm -rf ~/Ansoft/$EBVERSIONANSYSEDT/Antennas` followed by `cp -a $EBROOTANSYSEDT/v242/Linux64/Examples/HFSS/Antennas ~/Ansoft/$EBVERSIONANSYSEDT`.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps to run one of the AnsysEDT Antennas examples after retrieving them?
qa_pairs.answer: To run an Antennas example, first open one of the `.aedt` files. Then, click `HFSS -> Validation Check`. Next, navigate to `simulation -> setup -> advanced -> Mesh/Solution options` and select `Use Defaults`. Finally, start the simulation by clicking `Simulation -> Analyze All`.
